rationale: Section 11.201 governs rollback taxes on sale of religious organization property exempt under Section 11.20(a)(6). It is wholly unrelated to the residence homestead exemption in Section 11.13(b). No conflict exists.
quote: Sec. 11.201. ADDITIONAL TAX ON SALE OF CERTAIN RELIGIOUS ORGANIZATION PROPERTY.
_note: Rule cited addresses religious organization property rollback taxes, not residence homestead exemptions; no overlap with proposed change.
